# Security.DataSensitivity enumeration

A coarse data-sensitivity class governing the strength of access controls a host SHOULD apply (spec §28.1, §28.4, R-28.1-g, R-28.4-c).

```csharp
public enum DataSensitivity
```

## Values

| name | value | description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Public | `0` | Public data. |
| Internal | `1` | Internal data. |
| Confidential | `2` | Confidential data. |
| Secret | `3` | Secret data — the most sensitive. |
